Title: Automate your repo with GitHub agentic workflows
Author: GitHub
Description:
Have you tried GitHub agentic workflows yet? This new feature allows you to author intent-driven repository workflows using plain Markdown and execute them with coding agents in GitHub Actions. From generating daily maintainer reports to proposing fixes for CI failures, you can automate almost anything. Agentic workflows are now available in technical preview.

#AI #AgenticWorkflows #GitHub
